'''ZA-13''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Deep Space Manufacturing Facility|factory space station]] located in the [[Omar system/Legends|Omar system]]. It originally manufactured the [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] units for the [[TIE/ad starfighter|TIE Avenger]] fighters.

==History==
When Admiral [[Demetrius Zaarin]]'s plan to capture Emperor [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and rule the Empire failed, he and his co-conspirators fled. Zaarin and his allies would then attempt to loot Imperial facilities and space stations as they fled.

One space station that Zaarin's forces looted was the factory ZA-13. ZA-13's survival was critical, as Zaarin's fleeing forces already destroyed every other TIE Avenger factory station in the [[Omar system/Legends|Omar system]]. Imperial Admiral [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] was dispatched to secure ZA-13 and drive off Zaarin's looters. Thrawn's task force, with the aid of ace Imperial pilot [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], drove off Zaarin's ships, the [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvettes]] ''[[Z-Oz Group]]'', the [[modular conveyor]]s ''[[Z-Cod Group]]'' and the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] [[Z-Coral|''Coral'']].

With the loss of several other TIE Avenger facilities across the Empire, the recapture of ZA-13 became a top priority. Maarek Stele again was chosen to be the lead flight as he had to escort personnel to ZA-13 while repelling another attack by Zaarin's forces, led by the [[Carrack-class light cruiser/Legends|''Carrack''-class light cruiser]] ''[[Z-Jumimi]]'' and three [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]] from the ''[[Z-Caplure Group]]''. The [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Render]]'' arrived to relieve Stele.

Thrawn was then given orders to guard the facility while it was converted from making hyperdrive units to full TIE Avenger production. During the conversion, however, [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] raiders attacked the convoy, code name [[Rope 17]], that was bringing the parts for the conversion to ZA-13. The Rebel fighters and bombers were armed with their new [[Mag-pulse warhead/Legends|magnetic pulse]] warhead. Admiral Thrawn's forces quickly drove the Rebels off, and routed the origin of the raid. The Rebel raiding force came from a Rebel space station, ''[[RS-32]]'', which manufactured Mag Pulse warheads.

Thrawn knew this would be a chance to strike a major blow to the Rebels and sent most of his task force to capture ''RS-32'', leaving two [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigates]] behind to defend ZA-13. Admiral Thrawn successfully captured ''RS-32'', but while the brunt of his forces were away, the rogue Admiral Zaarin launched a strike on ZA-13, destroying the factory and a large number of the loyalist forces defending the facility.

The loss of ZA-13 further crippled the Galactic Empire's TIE Avenger production capabilities, ultimately providing Admiral Zaarin an edge over his adversaries.
